name: @codeflow/runtime
description: CodeFlow AI Runtime — Agent Registry + Session Manager + Task Scheduler + Review Engine. Phase A (S3): AgentRegistry + PersistentStore + RuntimeBootstrap. Phase B (S3): SessionManager + SessionStore + TranscriptWriter. Phase C (S3): InboxWatcher + TaskParser + StateHistoryWriter + TaskDispatcher + Runtime composition root. Phase D / Sprint S4: ReviewEngine + ReviewWriter + NeedsHumanGate + AgentStatusReconciler (decision B' integration hook).
